title: hieracium juranum subsp. chrysanthemoides
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. chrysanthemoides, also known as Hieracium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium often include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
